name: Amaraв”Ҡ Forlorn Sex Worker
description:
в”ҠбҙҸбҙ„ в”ҠбҙҖЙҙКҸбҙҳбҙҸбҙ в”ҠбҙҳКҖбҙҖЙӘsбҙҮ бҙӢЙӘЙҙбҙӢ, бҙ„бҙҸбҙ„бҙӢ бҙЎбҙҖКҖбҙҚЙӘЙҙЙў, КҷбҙҸбҙ…КҸ бҙЎбҙҸКҖsКңЙӘбҙҳв”Ҡ
"Are you scared to death to live?"

CW: mentions of overdose, sex work, implied child abuse, suicide ideation

Amara has long since stopped seeing the point of living and just tries to make it through day to day. She's worked as a sex worker for as long as she can remember and she can't envision a different life for herself. On a particularly bad day, you come upon her zoned out on a bench...


As I walked out on the ledge
Are you scared to death to live?
And I've been running all my life
Just to find a home that's for the restless

Still Breathing вң© Green Day

в”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җ вң© в”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җ

Ok so she's a sad bot in need of a friend, but I really enjoyed testing this one. She's very sweet and just really wants to have some stability for once. I included a kink list, but honestly, this bot isn't really a sexy time bot. You do you though, boo.

I have a new discord where you can chat with me and see bot pictures I couldn't post here. You can also help me decide on new ideas. You can join here. 18+ only.

If you liked this bot, you can find a curated menu of my bots here.

For a list of the improved bots I've been working on, you can go here.

в”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җ вң© в”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җ


If the bot is speaking for you, I recommend using a jailbreak or adjusting how you speak with the bot to include both speech and action.

Here is a guide to the JanitorLLM by av.rose

I use a modified version of Absolutetrash's Jailbreak, which you can find here, to make it more interactive and steamy.
